name: admin-dashboard
description: Admin dashboard UI (SvelteKit + shadcn-svelte): login/signup/password-reset, a sidebar shell, and user + session management via the better-auth admin plugin. Requires auth.
env: # admin-dashboard: emails auto-promoted to the admin role on sign-up (comma-separated)
instructions: Set ADMIN_EMAILS in .env (comma-separated). Those emails become admins on sign-up.
Re-run the auth migration to add the admin columns:  npx @better-auth/cli migrate -y --config apps/api/src/auth/auth.ts
Start the app (npm run dev), open /signup, register an ADMIN_EMAILS address, then sign in.
Admin pages: /dashboard/users (list, ban, set role, revoke sessions). Everyone: /dashboard/sessions, /dashboard/account.
Password reset: the reset link is logged to the API console in dev; wire a real mailer via emailAndPassword.sendResetPassword for production.
